transcription.text: If you didn't know, you can get Coachella tickets with this travel hack, so watch until the end if you want to learn how. So definitely make sure to watch that video if you haven't seen it. For anyone who wanted to know how to get Marriott Bomboy points, I wanted to explain a few ways here. So the first thing you have to do to participate is become a Marriott Bomboy member, which literally takes one minute and it's totally free. You can just download the Marriott Bomboy app or you can go to this website. If you want Marriott Bomboy points, there are a few ways to get them. So the quickest way is probably to transfer airline miles. And some airlines let you transfer those miles to Marriott points. Now, very important to keep in mind, for some programs, there may be a minimum amount of miles for transfer. So you can't just transfer one point, you might have to transfer 10,000. The second way to earn points is if you stay at Marriott properties. So here's all the details to consider about that.
